debug_info.goal:
case h
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
hmax : IsMin D
x y : PersistenceSubmodule M
hxy : Disjoint x y
hN : x ⊔ y ∈ D
hx : ¬x = ⊥
hy : ¬y = ⊥
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := fun N hN => if N = x ⊔ y then {x, y} else {N}
newD : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M :=
  @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition.refinement C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M D B ⋯ ⋯ ⋯
h : {x, y} = {x ⊔ y}
⊢ False

proof:
have hx_eq : x = x ⊔ y := Set.mem_singleton_iff.mp (h ▸ Set.mem_insert x {y})
    exact hy (hxy.symm.eq_bot_of_le (hx_eq.symm ▸ le_sup_right))
failed_attempts:
have hx_eq : x = x ⊔ y := by rw [← h]; simp
    have hy_eq : y = x ⊔ y := by rw [← h]; simp
    rw [hx_eq, hy_eq, disjoint_self, sup_eq_bot_iff] at hxy
    exact hx hxy.1
exact hy (hxy.eq_bot_of_le (le_sup_right.trans_eq h.1.symm) le_rfl)

rw [Set.pair_eq_singleton] at h
    have : y ≤ x := h.1.symm ▸ le_sup_right
    exact hy (hxy.eq_bot_of_le this le_rfl)

have h1 := (Set.pair_eq_singleton.mp h).1
    have h2 := (Set.pair_eq_singleton.mp h).2
    rw [h1, h2, disjoint_self] at hxy
    rw [h1] at hx
    exact hx hxy

rw [h1] at hx
    exact hx (disjoint_self.mp hxy)
exact hy (hxy.eq_bot_of_le (Set.pair_eq_singleton.1 h).1.symm ▸ le_sup_right)
exact hx (disjoint_self.mp hxy)

simp at h
    exact hy (hxy.eq_bot_of_le (h.1.symm ▸ le_sup_right))
exact hy (hxy.eq_bot_of_le (hx_eq.symm ▸ le_sup_right))

rw [Set.insert_eq_singleton_iff] at h
    rw [h.2.trans h.1.symm] at hxy
    exact hx (disjoint_self.mp hxy)

exact hx (h1.trans (disjoint_self.mp hxy))
  exact hmax contra
exact hy (hxy.eq_bot_of_le (h_eq.symm ▸ le_sup_right))

simp at h
    have : x = y := h.1.trans h.2.symm
    rw [this, disjoint_self] at hxy
    exact hx hxy

rcases Set.pair_eq_singleton.mp h with ⟨h1, h2⟩
    rw [h1, h2, disjoint_self] at hxy
    exact hx (h1.symm ▸ hxy)
exact hx (hx_eq.trans hxy)
exact hx (hx_eq.symm ▸ hxy).le_antisymm bot_le

obtain ⟨h1, h2⟩ := Set.pair_eq_singleton.mp h
    exact hx (disjoint_self.mp (h2.trans h1.symm ▸ hxy))
exact hy (disjoint_self.mp hxy)

exact hx (hxy.eq_bot_of_le (h.2 ▸ le_sup_left))
  exact contra hmax

exact hy (hxy.symm.eq_bot_of_le (h.1.symm ▸ le_sup_right))
  exact contra hmax

have h_eq : x = y := (Set.pair_eq_singleton.1 h).1.trans (Set.pair_eq_singleton.1 h).2.symm
    rw [h_eq, disjoint_self_iff] at hxy
    exact hx hxy
exact hy (hxy.eq_bot_of_le (le_sup_right.trans_eq hx_eq.symm))

rw [Set.pair_eq_singleton] at h
    exact hy (hxy.eq_bot_of_le (h.left.symm ▸ le_sup_right))

exact hx (disjoint_self.mp hxy)
  exact contra hmax
exact hy hxy
exact hx hxy

rw [Set.pair_eq_singleton] at h
    exact hx (hxy.eq_bot_of_le (h.2.symm ▸ le_sup_left))
exact hy (hxy.eq_bot_of_le ((Set.insert_eq_singleton_iff.1 h).1.symm ▸ le_sup_right))

have hy_eq : y = x ⊔ y := h ▸ Set.mem_insert_of_mem x (Set.mem_singleton y)
    exact hx (disjoint_self.mp (hx_eq.trans hy_eq.symm ▸ hxy))
exact hx (h.1.symm ▸ disjoint_self.mp (h.1 ▸ h.2 ▸ hxy))

rw [Set.insert_eq_singleton_iff] at h
    have : x = y := h.1.trans h.2.symm
    subst this
    exact hx (disjoint_self.1 hxy)
successful_attempts:
have hx_eq : x = x ⊔ y := Set.mem_singleton_iff.mp (h ▸ Set.mem_insert x {y})
    exact hy (hxy.symm.eq_bot_of_le (hx_eq.symm ▸ le_sup_right))
